title: [sp:03-plan] Create implementation plan for better-auth-migration
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-better-auth-migration/spec.md
**Skills**: /prefactoring, /glossary
**Context**: Generate plan.md with technical architecture and data-model.md. Resolve deferred items: isolated auth DB adapter (pg/Kysely, NOT Drizzle+postgres-js), test session-row cleanup, coverage strategy for auth glue, BETTER_AUTH_URL/cookie-origin, cookieSecret>=32 enforcement, User.id number->string ripple landed cohesively. Constitution VI exemption (v1.1.0) already in place.
**Acceptance**: All technical decisions documented; file structure defined; Constitution Check passes.
close_reason: Plan complete: created plan.md, research.md, data-model.md, contracts/auth-api.yaml, quickstart.md. Resolved all deferred questions (isolated pg.Pool adapter, @noble/hashes v2 import drift, test-isolation cleanup, coverage strategy, cookieSecret>=32 fail-fast, BETTER_AUTH_URL alignment, User.id ripple inventory). Constitution check PASS pre/post-design.

title: [sp:04-red-team] Perform adversarial review for better-auth-migration
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-better-auth-migration/spec.md, plan.md
**Skills**: None
**Context**: Adversarial review of spec and plan; enhance plan.md with security (auth bypass, session fixation, account enumeration, hash params), edge cases, performance, accessibility.
**Acceptance**: plan.md enhanced with adversarial findings; red team review complete

title: [sp:05-tasks] Generate implementation tasks for better-auth-migration
description:

title: [sp:06-analyze] Analyze artifacts for better-auth-migration
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-better-auth-migration/spec.md, plan.md, beads tasks
**Skills**: None (read-only analysis)
**Context**: Validate cross-artifact consistency, coverage gaps, constitution alignment (esp. VI exemption + Persistence domain scope).

title: [sp:07-implement] Execute implementation for better-auth-migration
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-better-auth-migration/spec.md, plan.md
**Skills**: Per-task (see task descriptions)
**Context**: TDD implementation - strict red-green-refactor for all tasks. Keep full-project typecheck green per commit (User.id ripple).
**Acceptance**: All tasks closed, tests pass, coverage threshold maintained

title: [sp:08-harden] Iterative review + remediation for better-auth-migration
description:
**Spec**: specs/001-better-auth-migration/spec.md, plan.md
**Skills**: /security-review, /clean-architecture-validator, /quality-review, /glossary
**Context**: Loop security -> architecture -> code quality reviews, running ralph between each to fix p1/p2 findings. Restart-on-fix. Exit on three clean reviews or 5-cycle cap.
**Acceptance**: No remaining p1/p2 findings; remediation tasks closed; harden state file deleted.
